mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_name, sign_in_start_offset_min, sign_in_end_offset_min, late_threshold_min, absent_threshold_min, allow_makeup, status FROM attendance_rule ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, rule_name, sign_in_start_offset_min, sign_in_end_offset_min, late_threshold_min, absent_threshold_min, allow_makeup, status FROM attendance_rule WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_rule (rule_name, sign_in_start_offset_min, sign_in_end_offset_min, late_threshold_min, absent_threshold_min, allow_makeup, status) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{signInStartOffsetMin}, #{signInEndOffsetMin}, #{lateThresholdMin}, #{absentThresholdMin}, #{allowMakeup}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_rule SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, sign_in_start_offset_min = #{signInStartOffsetMin}, sign_in_end_offset_min = #{signInEndOffsetMin}, late_threshold_min = #{lateThresholdMin}, absent_threshold_min = #{absentThresholdMin}, allow_makeup = #{allowMakeup}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE attendance_rule SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
